name: ai-mission-control
description: A local, real-time mission-control dashboard for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex/ChatGPT, Gemini CLI) — exact usage-limit gauges, per-task and per-agent progress, system telemetry, and a reactive 3D sci-fi UI. Pure Node, zero dependencies, runs on Windows/macOS/Linux.
author: Jiro Lao
